sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68005" key="misqo/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μισθό-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving wages</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pay</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0457.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eubulid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
